{{CargoRelic
|name=Broken Crown
|class_id=20101
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Gastric juice dissolved all of the crown's ornaments, but its main body remains intact. Shining under the sun's rays, its shimmering body makes it seem extraordinary.
|fame=12
|art=15
|fth=14
|civ=32
|tech=17
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5 CIV Pistils Used, Snail ATK +1<br>CIV Pistils Used: 100/100
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 5 CIV Pistils Used, Snail ATK +2<br>CIV Pistils Used: 100/100
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5 CIV Pistils Used, Snail ATK +3<br>CIV Pistils Used: 100/100
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5 CIV Pistils Used, Snail ATK +3<br>CIV Pistils Used: 100/100
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5 CIV Pistils Used, Snail ATK +3<br>CIV Pistils Used: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
